name: chimera
description: Host-authoritative, multiplatform multiplayer game engine built on Electron + React Three Fiber.
author: Jindrich Ruzicka <ing.jindrich.ruzicka@gmail.com>

scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:packages && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p simulation/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p ai/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p networking/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p renderer/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p electron/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/tactics/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm build:packages && pnpm -r test && vitest run --dir tools
scripts.package:tactics: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_CHIMERA_PACKAGED=1 next build apps/tactics/renderer && cross-env CHIMERA_PACKAGED_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics run package
scripts.package:tactics:mac-dir: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_CHIMERA_PACKAGED=1 next build apps/tactics/renderer && cross-env CHIMERA_PACKAGED_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics exec electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.package:tactics:mac-dmg: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_CHIMERA_PACKAGED=1 next build apps/tactics/renderer && cross-env CHIMERA_PACKAGED_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics exec electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.package:tactics:win: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_CHIMERA_PACKAGED=1 next build apps/tactics/renderer && cross-env CHIMERA_PACKAGED_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics exec electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.package:tactics:linux-appimage: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_CHIMERA_PACKAGED=1 next build apps/tactics/renderer && cross-env CHIMERA_PACKAGED_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics exec electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.package:tactics:linux-dir: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_CHIMERA_PACKAGED=1 next build apps/tactics/renderer && cross-env CHIMERA_PACKAGED_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics exec electron-builder --linux dir
scripts.test:perf: pnpm build:packages && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--expose-gc CHIMERA_PERF_STRICT=1 vitest run apps/tactics/__tests__/ActionPipelinePerf.bench.test.ts
scripts.lint: pnpm build:packages && pnpm -r lint && eslint tools eslint.config.mjs vitest.config.mts
scripts.dev:mp: pnpm build:packages && pnpm exec next build apps/tactics/renderer && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics build:app && pnpm --filter @chimera-engine/tactics dev:mp
